prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement plugin signature verification: the plugin manifest signing, the signature validation on load, and the unsigned plugin allowlist enforcement.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement plugin signature verification: the plugin manifest signing, the signature validation on load, and the unsigned plugin allowlist enforcement.
